name: Coding Agent
description: HuggingFace Space coding tools — read, write, edit, search, and manage code on HF Spaces with syntax validation

targetSpace.description: HuggingFace Space repo ID to manage (e.g. tao-shen/HuggingClaw-Cain)

targetDataset.description: HuggingFace Dataset repo ID for persistent data (e.g. tao-shen/HuggingClaw-Cain-data)

hfToken.description: HuggingFace API token (or use HF_TOKEN env var)
